name: Mal Debt Conversion Office
summary: Administrative office converting or settling old Mal-linked obligations under the Union successor regime.
day_to_day: Reviews old debts, validates claims, restructures obligations, and archives outcomes.
who_works_there: Debt clerks, auditors, claimant advocates, archive staff.
who_uses_it: Claimants, merchants, remnant Mal interests, Union officials.
authority: Can recognize, reduce, convert, or reject old debt claims under successor rules.
public_manifestation: Claim lines, disputed ledgers, posted settlement notices, angry petitions.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Legacy claims are emotionally charged and often impossible to resolve cleanly.
